text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> and I are out shopping for
shoes when we run into Trainer Kiryuin and Happy
Meek.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't
Trainer <username>!
Are you buying shoes as well?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course! After all, a first-rate Umamusume
needs first-rate gear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start looking through the shelves alongside an
excited Trainer Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Look, Meek! It's those new shoes from the
magazine.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Their performance is backed up by sports science
and endorsed by top-level Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But from a comfort perspective, the shoes next to
them are the way to go.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
This model has excellent cushioning and reduces
strain on the legs.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Considering your running style, these may be the
better choice.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Happy Meek nods. She opens her mouth as if to
speak, but closes it again without saying
anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize she's staring at something and follow her
gaze to another pair of shoes. If my hunch is
correct...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Right, I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Could you wait here, Meek? I'm just going to go
pay.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: All right...
choice_data_list: Shouldn't you tell her you want those shoes?
Shouldn't you tell her you want those shoes?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
No... It's all right. I'm happy with the shoes my
trainer picked out for me.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I know she's just thinking about what's best for
me... She works really hard, you know.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
So it's fine... I just thought those shoes looked
like baguettes, that's all.
choice_data_list: She'll be happier if you're honest with her.
She'll be happier if you're honest with her.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: You... really think so?
choice_data_list: I'm a trainer too. I know these things.
I'm a trainer too. I know these things.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Thank you... I'll go and tell her...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Meek...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I got so caught up in doing what I thought was
best, I didn't think to consider you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: What's most important is that the shoes fit your desires. Asking you how you felt should have been the first thing I did.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Let's go back to the store and choose again, shall we? This time, together.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for looking out for Meek,
Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I also want to say... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
From now on... I'll tell my trainer what I want when
we're choosing shoes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing off Trainer Kiryuin,
<chrname> and I pick out a pair of
shoes that fit her preferences.
